Off Calendar May-17-2024 Continued To Jul-03-24 At 11:00 A.M. In Dept 505
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar for an order of examination as to Judgment Debtor Anna Y. Wong and Judgment Debtor Jimmy Quan.

Dept.505: Judge: Maria Evangelista; Clerk: N.Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:05 am and concluding at 11:17 am

Kevin S. Eikenberry, Esq. appearing for and on behalf of Judgment Creditor Neman Brothers Associates, Inc., A California Corporation.
Judgment Debtor Jimmy Quan appeared in pro per, was placed under oath. Judgment Debtor is assisted by Cantonese Speaking Interpreter Connie Chen , #700105.
Judgment Debtor Anna Y. Wong not appearing.

Counsel to state on the record the request to the Court.
Court examines Judgment Debtor as to the Counsel's request to the Court.

The Court orders that the Order to Appear for Examination is continued to July 3, 2024 at 11:00 a.m. in Dept. 505. Judgment Debtor is ordered by the Court to provide Judgment Creditor, judgment debtor's complete creditors list , fill out the form and provide to the judgment creditor by email before the next scheduled examination date of July 3, 2024.
(D505)

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being continued from Apr-19-2023 for continued order of examination of Jimmy Quan, AKA To H. Quan, AKA Toha Quan, AKA To Ha Quan.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: S. Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 02:40:16 p.m. and concluding at 02:44:14 p.m.

Creditor Neman Brothers and Associates represented by Kevin Scott Eikenberry, Esq.
Debtor Jimmy Quan, AKA To H. Quan, AKA Toha Quan, AKA To Ha Quan not appearing.

Counsel for Creditor was contacted by Debtor and its counsel to inform him that Debtor is ill and has a medical appointment today. Debtor requests a continuance of order of examination. Counsel for Creditor does not object.

Court orders matter continued to May-24-2023 at 2:00 p.m. in Department 505 for further orders of examination pursuant to stipulation of the parties. Creditor shall provide notice.

Orders of Examination scheduled on May-12-2023 at 11:00 a.m. in Department 505 and May-19-2023 at 11:00 a.m. in Department 505 are VACATED pursuant to request of Creditor.

MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for order of examination of Defendant Jimmy Quan, AKA To H. Quan, AKA Toha Quan, AKA To Ha Quan.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 04:07:32 p.m. and concluding at 04:30:27 p.m.

Plaintiff Neman Brothers and Associates represnted by Kevin Scott Eikenberry, Esq.
Defendant Jimmy Quan, AKA To H. Quan, AKA Toha Quan, AKA To Ha Quan appearing in pro per. Defendant is assisted by a Vietnamese Language Interpreter, Linda Tsoi; Certification No. 301875.

Defendant Jimmy Quan, AKA To H. Quan, AKA Toha Quan, AKA To Ha Quan is placed under oath, examined, and parties reach an empass. Plaintiff requests court intervention.

Court determines this matter arises from judgment entered in Los Angeles, California.
Defendants subject to judgment reside in San Francisco, California.

Plaintiff provides proof that Defendant Defendant Jimmy Quan, AKA To H. Quan, AKA Toha Quan, AKA To Ha Quan is included as a Debtor with Defendant Anna Y. Wong.

The following exhibits are MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit A - Declaration of Kevin Scott Eikenberry, Esq.

Based on judgment filed 11/21/2022, Court finds that Defendant Jimmy Quan, AKA To H. Quan, AKA Toha Quan, AKA To Ha Quan is a Co-Debtor in this matter.

Court admonishes Defendant as to its compliance during order of examination and orders matter continued to May-10-2023 at 2:00 p.m. in Department 505 for further order of examination. DEBTOR Jimmy Quan, AKA To H. Quan, AKA Toha Quan, AKA To Ha Quan IS ORDERED TO APPEAR.
